title: Kaminoan nano-virus

The '''Kaminoan Nano-Virus''' was a [[Nanovirus|Nanogene]] virus created by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist-aligned]] [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] [[Kuma Nai]] to kill all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. It was discovered by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] a few months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], who were staying at [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] when they passed a squad of dead troops. After confirming a deadly virus, [[Prime Minister (Kamino)|Prime Minister]] [[Lama Su/Legends|Lama Su]] issued [[Clone Master/Legends|Clone Master]] [[Sayn Ta]] to create a [[Kaminoan nano-virus vaccine|vaccine]] to protect all clones. Fisto and Secura tracked the defector and killed her, but could not save Sayn Ta from being killed. After Ta's death, the other cloners injected vaccines into all clones.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|14|Tides of Terror}} {{1st}}
